# `advisors` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `AdvisorApplication`

```prisma
model AdvisorApplication {
  id                  String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId              String    @unique
  fullName            String
  email               String
  phone               String
  experienceYears     Int
  expertise           String
  organizationName    String?
  bio                 String
  panDocumentPath     String?
  aadhaarDocumentPath String?
  certDocumentPath    String?
  status              String    @default("PENDING")
  rejectionReason     String?
  reviewedBy          String?
  reviewedAt          DateTime?
  submittedAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  createdAt           DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt           DateTime  @updatedAt
  user                User      @relation("AdvisorApplication_user", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  reviewer            User?     @relation("AdvisorApplication_reviewer", fields: [reviewedBy], references: [id])

  @@index([status])
  @@index([userId])
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `AdvisorAvailability`

```prisma
model AdvisorAvailability {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  advisorId String
  dayOfWeek Int
  startTime String
  endTime   String
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
  advisor   User     @relation(fields: [advisorId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([advisorId])
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `AdvisorSession`

```prisma
model AdvisorSession {
  id           String         @id @default(uuid())
  bookingId    String         @unique
  advisorId    String
  clientId     String
  startTime    DateTime
  endTime      DateTime?
  sessionType  String
  status       String         @default("scheduled")
  notes        String?
  rating       Float?
  feedback     String?
  createdAt    DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime       @updatedAt
  advisor      User           @relation("AdvisorSession_advisorIdToUser", fields: [advisorId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  booking      BookingRequest @relation(fields: [bookingId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  client       User           @relation("AdvisorSession_clientIdToUser", fields: [clientId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chatMessages ChatMessage[]
  payment      Payment?

  @@index([advisorId])
  @@index([clientId])
  @@index([startTime])
  @@index([status])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
